task: decisive kernel grep: does dev307 vLLM carry the sparse-Marlin (2:4) path?

1_python_scheme_class.note: NO compressed_tensors_w4a16_24.py / W4A16Sparse24 / CompressedTensors24 scheme class. Only dense W/A schemes remain.

2_compiled_custom_op.note: Dense marlin_gemm (the live 126.378 WNA16 baseline path) IS present. The 2:4 sparse op gptq_marlin_24_gemm is NOT compiled into this build.

3_kernel_files.found_only: unrelated fp8 block-shape tuning JSONs (N=24576 dims) for H100/H200/MI325X etc.

4_config_parser_active_rejection.behavior: raise DeprecationWarning('Sparsity support has been removed from compressed-tensors. Please use a model without sparsity configuration.') on any non-empty sparse_scheme_map
4_config_parser_active_rejection.note: vLLM-VENDORED parser (not just the external compressed-tensors pip pkg) actively rejects any checkpoint carrying a sparsity_config BEFORE kernel dispatch.

pr611_corroboration: PR #611 stage0 end-to-end already load-failed all three sub-int4 variants at exactly this parser ('Sparsity support has been removed...'). This grep is the direct kernel-level confirmation of that inference: scheme class gone, compiled op gone, parser rejects.
dense_path_intact: WNA16 (compressed_tensors_wNa16.py + marlin_utils.marlin_gemm) — the int4 g128 126.378 baseline path — is fully present and unaffected. Only the sparse-2:4 path was removed.
other_subint4_schemes_in_dev307: The only sub-int4-byte schemes present are W4A4 mxfp4/nvfp4 — both require Blackwell (sm_100); not runnable on A10G sm_86 (consistent with #611 map). No Ampere-viable sub-int4 weight-compression path exists.
optionc_verdict: kernel_present=false. The sparse-Marlin path (gptq_marlin_24_gemm + W4A16Sparse24/CompressedTensors24) is FULLY REMOVED from vLLM dev307 — Python scheme class, compiled CUDA op, and config parser all gone/rejecting — while dense WNA16->Marlin (the 126.378 baseline) is intact. Option-C approach (a) 2:4-sparse W4A16 is DEAD on this stack. With every other sub-int4/mixed format already closed (#611) and the W4A4 fp4 schemes Blackwell-only, this CLOSES option C: 126.378 TPS stands as the quality-safe AR ceiling for the weight-compression lever. NO BUILD per PR instructions.
decision: terminal — do not build, do not serve, no HF Job, no fire.
